text: لِلَّهِ‌ مُلْکُ‌ السَّمَاوَاتِ‌ وَ الْأَرْضِ‌ وَ مَا فِيهِنَ‌ وَ هُوَ عَلَى‌ کُلِ‌ شَيْ‌ءٍ قَدِيرٌ

en.ahmedali: To God belongs all that is in the heavens and the earth, and His the power over everything.
en.ahmedraza: To Allah only belongs the kingship of the heavens and the earth and all that is in them: and He is Able to do all things.
en.arberry: To God belongs the kingdom of the heavens and of the earth, and all that is in them, and He is powerful over everything.
en.daryabadi: Allah's is the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever Is therein, and over everything He is Potent.
en.hilali: To Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and all that is therein, and He is Able to do all things.
en.itani: To God belongs the sovereignty of the heavens and the earth and what lies in them, and He has power over everything.
en.maududi: To Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and all that is in them and He has full power over everything.
en.mubarakpuri: To Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and all that is therein, and He is able to do all things.
en.pickthall: Unto Allah belongeth the Sovereignty of the heavens and the earth and whatsoever is therein, and He is Able to do all things.
en.qarai: To Allah belongs the kingdom of the heavens and the earth and whatever there is in them, and He has power over all things.
en.qaribullah: To Allah belongs the Kingdom of the heavens and the earth and what is in them. He has power over all things.
en.sahih: To Allah belongs the dominion of the heavens and the earth and whatever is within them. And He is over all things competent.
en.sarwar: To God belongs the kingdom of the heavens and the earth and all that is between them and He has power over all things.
en.shakir: Allah's is the kingdom of the heavens and the earth and what is in them; and He has power over all things.
en.transliteration: Lillahi mulku alssamawati waalardi wama feehinna wahuwa AAala kulli shayin qadeerun
en.wahiduddin: The kingdom of the heavens and the earth and everything in them belongs to God: He has power over all things.
en.yusufali: To Allah doth belong the dominion of the heavens and the earth, and all that is therein, and it is He Who hath power over all things.
fa.ansarian: مالکیّت و فرمانروایی آسمان ها و زمین و آنچه در آنهاست، فقط در سیطره خداست، و او بر هر کاری تواناست.
fa.ayati: از آن خداست فرمانروايى آسمانها و زمين و آنچه ميان آنهاست. و او بر هر كارى تواناست.
fa.bahrampour: فرمانروايى آسمان‌ها و زمين و آنچه در ميان آنهاست از آن خداوند است، و او بر هر كارى تواناست
fa.fooladvand: فرمانروايى آسمانها و زمين و آنچه در آنهاست از آنِ خداست، و او بر هر چيزى تواناست.
fa.ghomshei: فرمانروایی آسمانها و زمین و هر چه در آنهاست خدای راست، و او بر هر چیز تواناست.
fa.khorramdel: حکومت آسمانها و زمین و آنچه در آنها است، از آن خدا است، و او بر هر چیزی توانا است. [[«مُلْک»: شاهی. کشور. عزّت و قدرت.]]
fa.khorramshahi: فرمانروایی آسمانها و زمین و آنچه در میان آنهاست، از آن خداوند است، و او بر هر کاری تواناست‌
fa.makarem: حکومت آسمانها و زمین و آنچه در آنهاست، از آن خداست؛ و او بر هر چیزی تواناست.
fa.moezzi: خدای را است پادشاهی آسمانها و زمین و آنچه در آنها است و او است بر همه چیز توانا
fa.mojtabavi: خداى راست پادشاهى آسمانها و زمين و آنچه در آنهاست و او بر هر چيزى تواناست.
fa.sadeqi: فرمانروایی آسمان‌ها و زمین و آنچه در آنهاست تنها از آنِ خداست و او بر هر چیزی تواناست.
